response.justification: This Staff-level engineer is significantly overqualified for an entry-level position, presenting substantial flight risk and misaligned compensation expectations unsuitable for the role's strategic fit. Additional disqualifying concerns include an unexplained identity inconsistency (resume name Aisha Okonkwo vs. all contact information under Szabo Bogdan), gaps in specific required technologies (PostgreSQL, Nest.js), and zero renewable energy or construction technology domain experience.
strengths: Expert-level TypeScript and full-stack capabilities with Node.js and React directly addressing core technical requirements
Proven 15+ year track record of software craftsmanship, TDD, and clean architecture across complex systems
Demonstrated rapid learning across diverse languages and problem domains with strong mentoring and teaching abilities
concerns: Significant overqualification as Staff/Senior Engineer for entry-level Junior/Mid-Level position creates retention risk and compensation misalignment
Resume header name (Aisha Okonkwo) fundamentally inconsistent with all contact details and URLs (Szabo Bogdan) raises verification and authenticity red flags
Missing explicit experience in required stack (PostgreSQL, Nest.js) and critical domain knowledge in renewable energy or construction technology
